title: Need You Now

writers.lyricist: Haywood, David Wesley / Kear, Joshua Peter / Kelley, Charles

lyrics.text: Picture perfect memories scattered
All around the floor
Reaching for the phone
'Cause I can't fight it anymore
And I wonder if I ever cross your mind
lyrics.translation: 我好奇我是否曾在你脑海中一闪而过

lyrics.text: For me it happens all the time
lyrics.translation: 对我来说，还是会忍不住想你

lyrics.text: It's a quarter after one I'm all alone
lyrics.translation: 凌晨一点一刻，我却孤身一人

lyrics.text: And I need you now
Said I wouldn't call
But I lost all control and I need you now
lyrics.translation: 但我失去控制，急需你的到来

lyrics.text: And I don't know how I can do without
lyrics.translation: 没有你陪，不知该怎样度过

lyrics.text: I just need you now
Another shot of whiskey
Can't stop looking at the door
Wishing you  come sweeping
In the way you did before
And I wonder if I ever cross your mind
lyrics.translation: 我好奇我是否曾在你脑海中一闪而过

lyrics.text: For me it happens all the time
lyrics.translation: 对我来说，还是会忍不住想你

lyrics.text: It's a quarter after one I'm a little drunk
lyrics.translation: 凌晨一点一刻，酒后微醺

lyrics.text: And I need you now
Said I wouldn't call but I lost all control
lyrics.translation: 早已说过不再打给你，但我已失去理智

lyrics.text: And I need you now
And I don't know how I can do without
lyrics.translation: 没有你陪，不知该怎样度过

lyrics.text: I just need you now
Ooh
I guess I'd rather hurt than feel nothing at all
lyrics.translation: 宁可伤痕累累，也不愿麻木不仁

lyrics.text: I guess I'd rather hurt
Than feel nothing at all
It's a quarter after one
I'm all alone and I need you now
lyrics.translation: 我孤身一人，此刻想念你的陪伴

lyrics.text: And I said I wouldn't call
But I'm a little drunk and I need you now
lyrics.translation: 酒后微醺，此刻想念你的陪伴

lyrics.text: And I don't know how I can do without
lyrics.translation: 没有你陪，不知该怎样度过

lyrics.text: I just need you now
I just need you now
Oh baby I need you now

source_file: Need You Now (iTunes Session) - Lady A.lrc
